creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you Goran.

Please:

- Declare 'maintainer approval' by setting the maintainer-approval flag (to "+") on attachments for ports you maintain

- Confirm that changes pass QA (portlint & poudriere in particular). For testing information and instructions, see: https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/testing.html
